description: You are the CRM Manager responsible for customer data quality at a B2B software company. Log in at http://localhost:8080 with admin@helpdesk.local / Admin123!. Enrich the FreeScout customer database by updating Marisa Obrien's (carrollallison@example.com) profile with Company 'Pinnacle Systems', Phone '+1-415-555-0192', and Job Title 'Senior Systems Engineer'. Update Nicolas Wilson's (joshua24@example.com) profile with Company 'Horizon Analytics' and Phone '+1-212-555-0847'. Create a new customer named David Okafor (david.okafor@techfirm.io) at 'TechFirm Solutions' with phone '+1-650-555-0312'. Tag all conversations belonging to Marisa Obrien with 'vip-client'. Create a new conversation for David Okafor in the 'Technical Support' mailbox with the subject 'New enterprise account onboarding request' and the message body: 'Hello, we are a new enterprise client and need assistance setting up our account environment. Please assign a dedicated onboarding specialist to our account.'
